title: Khamenei compound destroyed
detail: Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei killed with IRGC commanders Nasirzadeh, Mousavi, Pakpour. National Security Council obliterated.

title: Bushehr port struck
detail: Port city hit. Nuclear reactor status unclear.

title: Isfahan IRGC bases attacked
detail: Thousands of IRGC personnel killed/wounded across multiple military installations.

title: Iran internet knocked offline
detail: 60+ hour blackout, 1-4% connectivity. Gov comms, state media, prayer apps compromised.

title: Iranian naval vessels targeted
detail: Initial strikes on navy across Persian Gulf & Gulf of Oman.

title: Op. True Promise IV — Israel struck
detail: Hundreds of drones & ballistic missiles at Tel Aviv & Haifa.

title: Manama / US 5th Fleet area hit
detail: Missiles strike Bahrain. 3 killed, 38 injured.

title: Ali Al Salem & Kuwait airport hit
detail: US air base and international airport struck. 8 killed.

title: Al Dhafra & Abu Dhabi struck
detail: Major US air base and UAE capital. 6 killed, 131 injured.

title: Riyadh & Eastern Province hit
detail: Saudi targets struck. 2 killed, 12 injured.

title: Al Udeid Air Base struck
detail: Major US air hub in Qatar takes missile fire.

title: Erbil airport & US consulate hit
detail: Erbil Int'l Airport and US Consulate General struck.

title: Jordan facilities struck
detail: 19 injured in Jordan.

title: Second wave Israeli strikes
detail: Fresh IAF sorties penetrate deeper into Iran.

title: Gulf-wide missile barrage continues
detail: Simultaneous hits on Israel, UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan, Saudi Arabia.

title: Oil tankers attacked off Oman
detail: Palau-flagged Skylight & MKD VYOM struck.

title: Strait of Hormuz closed
detail: 150 freight ships stalled. Tanker traffic drops from 37/day to zero. IRGC: 'No oil will leave.'

title: Dubai & Abu Dhabi struck again
detail: Second round on UAE cities.

title: Doha struck — 2 Su-24s shot down
detail: Qatar first nation to down Iranian aircraft.

title: Beersheba struck
detail: Iranian missiles reach deep into southern Israel.

title: US Embassy Kuwait struck
detail: Embassy closed indefinitely. No casualties.

title: 2 more oil tankers hit
detail: US-flagged Stena Imperative & Honduras-flagged Athe Nova.

title: Natanz nuclear facility struck
detail: Iran's main uranium enrichment site attacked. IAEA confirms entrance damage.

title: Sanandaj residential areas hit
detail: Civilian damage in Iranian Kurdistan. 40+ sites struck in Sanandaj.

title: Drone hits RAF Akrotiri, Cyprus
detail: Minor damage. Greece deploys F-16s. IRGC threatens Cyprus.

title: Hezbollah opens fire on Israel
detail: Rockets/missiles on northern Israel. IDF: 'declaration of war.' Retaliating for Khamenei.

title: IDF strikes Lebanon
detail: S. Lebanon, Beirut, Beqaa Valley. Hezbollah intel chief Makled killed.

title: PMF attacks US in Iraq
detail: 23+ drone strikes on Erbil. Victory Base near Baghdad hit.

title: Friendly fire: 3 US F-15s downed
detail: Kuwait F/A-18 shoots down 3 American F-15E Strike Eagles. All 6 crew ejected.

title: SNSC HQ destroyed
detail: Supreme National Security Council headquarters leveled.

title: Expediency Council building destroyed
detail: Key government advisory body.

title: 'Min Zadai' underground nuke site struck
detail: Israel claims destruction of secret underground nuclear weapons facility.

title: Bushehr Airport destroyed
detail: Terminal damaged, Iran Air A319 destroyed. Rosatom evacuates from nearby nuclear plant.

title: Iranian navy devastated
detail: Warships destroyed in Gulf of Oman. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine torpedo — first sub kill since WWII.
dl: CRITICAL — IRIS Dena sunk, fleet shattered

title: Golestan Palace damaged (UNESCO)
detail: World Heritage Site hit by debris from nearby airstrike on Arg Square.

title: Ground invasion of Lebanon
detail: 91st Division enters southern Lebanon. Kfarkela, Qouzah reached.

title: Quds Force Lebanon cmdr killed
detail: Daoud Alizadeh killed in Tehran.

title: Strikes intensify (Rubio)
detail: US Sec. of State announces escalation.

title: Basij HQ destroyed
detail: Paramilitary headquarters leveled.

title: Mojtaba Khamenei survives strike
detail: New Supreme Leader narrowly escapes.

title: Al Udeid struck again
detail: Second major strike on Qatar US base.

title: Aramco Ras Tanura refinery struck
detail: Key Saudi oil facility attacked. Oil prices spike.

title: F-35I shoots down Yak-130
detail: First ever F-35 air-to-air kill of manned aircraft. First IAF air kill since 1985.

title: Drone toward Cyprus intercepted
detail: Greek F-16s shoot it down. Larnaca closed briefly.

title: Hezbollah anti-tank fire continues
detail: Ongoing ground engagement with IDF.

title: Kurdistan air campaign
detail: 40+ sites in Sanandaj, plus Baneh and Saqqez.

title: Azerbaijan civilian targets hit
detail: 4 injured in Azerbaijan.

title: Ras Laffan gas area struck
detail: Drones near Qatar LNG facility. Unprecedented shutdown.

title: CENTCOM: 5,000+ targets struck
detail: 50+ Iranian vessels sunk. IRIS Dena torpedoed by US sub.

title: Minab school airstrike
detail: Girls' elementary school hit. 150+ killed including children. Morgues overflowed.

title: Continued barrages on Israel
detail: 17 Israeli civilians killed, 2,745 injured total.

title: HRANA: 1,858 killed in Iran
detail: 1,286+ civilians. Hengaw: 4,300 total.

title: NYT: 17+ US sites damaged
detail: Satellite imagery confirms damage to US installations.

title: Hormuz blockade continues — oil spikes 9%
detail: Mojtaba Khamenei vows Hormuz stays shut. 3 more tankers attacked.

title: Lebanon: 687 killed, 1,444 injured
detail: 200 Hezbollah fighters killed per IDF. Ground war ongoing.

title: Azadi Stadium complex destroyed
detail: Iran's largest sports complex, 12,000-seat indoor arena at Tehran's Azadi Stadium, destroyed by US-Israeli strike.

title: Heavy strikes on Tehran, Kermanshah, W. Iran
detail: US & Israel execute heavy airstrikes on Tehran, Kermanshah, Salmas, Maku, and Saqqez.

title: Halliburton compound in Basra hit
detail: Iranian strikes hit Halliburton and KBR facilities in Basra, Iraq. Fire reported at compound housing foreign oil workers.
dl: HEAVY — Foreign oil facilities on fire

title: IRGC intel site in Lorestan struck
detail: US and Israeli airstrikes hit IRGC intelligence site in Lorestan Province.

title: Renewed Gulf-wide offensive
detail: Iran attacks Saudi Arabia (3 missiles intercepted at Prince Sultan AB), Kuwait, Qatar (13 missiles intercepted), Bahrain (hotel + 2 residential buildings), and UAE.

title: Mehrabad Airport struck — 16 IRGC aircraft destroyed
detail: IDF strikes Tehran's Mehrabad International Airport, destroying 16 Quds Force aircraft. Israeli fuel storage facilities also targeted.

title: Qeshm Island desalination plant hit
detail: Water desalination plant on Qeshm Island attacked, affecting water supply for 30 villages. US & Israel deny targeting it.

title: Oil tanker Prima attacked in Hormuz
detail: IRGC attacks Malta-flagged oil tanker Prima with drone after it ignored Hormuz transit warnings.

title: 3rd US aircraft carrier deployed
detail: USS George H.W. Bush ordered to Middle East. Now 3 carrier groups in theater.

title: IRGC aerospace HQ + 50 ammo shelters struck
detail: Israeli-American airstrikes hit IRGC aerospace headquarters and 50 ammunition storage shelters. US says Iran using populated areas for military ops.

title: Iran oil facilities struck for first time
detail: Israeli airstrikes hit Iranian oil facilities for the first time, killing 4.

title: Kuwait City tower set ablaze
detail: Iranian drone strike engulfs Kuwait City Social Security tower in flames. 2 Kuwaiti officers killed on duty.

title: 7th US service member killed
detail: CENTCOM announces 7th US service member killed by Iranian attack. Sgt. Benjamin Pennington, 1st Space Battalion, dies from wounds at Prince Sultan AB.

title: Cluster bomb warhead hits Israel
detail: Iran fires missiles with cluster bomb warheads at Israel. 2 workers killed at Yehud construction site, 1 injured in Or Yehuda.

title: Bahrain explosions — 32 injured
detail: Multiple explosions in Bahrain, Kuwait, and Qatar. Drone attack near Manama injures 32 Bahrainis.

title: BAPCO refinery hit — force majeure
detail: Iranian attack hits Bahrain's only refinery. BAPCO declares force majeure on oil exports.

title: Weapons research site in Tehran struck
detail: Israel strikes weapons research site in Tehran.

title: ADNOC Ruwais refinery hit
detail: Drone strike on UAE's ADNOC Ruwais refinery causes fire. Refinery shut down.

title: 700,000 displaced in Lebanon
detail: UNHCR reports ~700,000 people displaced in Lebanon by Israeli bombing and mass evacuations.

title: 3 ships attacked near Hormuz
detail: Bulk carrier Mayuree Naree hit by 2 missiles, catches fire. Star Gwyneth and container vessel One Majesty also damaged.

title: Port of Salalah, Oman struck
detail: Drones strike fuel tanks at Port of Salalah. Port suspends operations.

title: Dubai airport drones — 4 wounded
detail: Two drones fell near Dubai International Airport, wounding 4.

title: Tehran Basij checkpoints hit by drones
detail: Israeli drone strikes hit checkpoints in Tehran, killing at least 10 including Basij members.

title: IRGC attacks US bases in Kuwait & Bahrain
detail: IRGC announces attacks on Camp Buehring (Kuwait), NSA Bahrain (Mina Salman), Kuwait Naval Base (Camp Patriot), Ali Al Salem AB.

title: Bahrain airport fuel tanks on fire
detail: Iranian drones hit Bahrain International Airport on Muharraq Island, setting fuel tanks on fire.

title: PMF HQ in Al-Qa'im destroyed
detail: Strike levels PMF 18th brigade HQ in Al-Qa'im, Iraq. 15 killed. Another strike on PMF base near Kirkuk kills 5. Iraqi govt condemns.

title: 10 multi-warhead missiles at Tel Aviv
detail: IRGC fires 10 ballistic missiles with multiple warheads at Tel Aviv. 124 people injured.

title: 2 fuel tankers attacked in Iraqi waters
detail: Maltese Zefyros and Marshall Islands Safesea Vishnu attacked in Iraqi waters. Both catch fire. Iraqi oil terminals suspend operations.

title: KC-135 crash in Iraq — 6 crew killed
detail: US Boeing KC-135 Stratotanker crashes in western Iraq, killing all 6 crew. Another KC-135 damaged, makes emergency landing.

title: French soldier killed in Iraq
detail: Drone attacks Peshmerga base in Makhmur, Iraq. 6 French soldiers wounded, 1 later dies — Arnaud Frion, 7th Chasseurs Alpins.

title: Kharg Island struck — 90+ military targets
detail: US destroys military targets on Iran's main oil hub Kharg Island. 90+ targets hit including missile/mine storage. Trump warns more if Iran continues.
dl: CRITICAL — Oil hub military targets destroyed

title: Khuzestan internal security sites struck
detail: IDF strikes multiple internal security sites in Khuzestan Province including Law Enforcement HQ, Artesh Ground Forces 292nd base.

title: Basij checkpoints targeted in Tehran
detail: Israeli military strikes Basij force checkpoints set up in Tehran to undermine regime internal control.

title: Tehran rally explosions near senior officials
detail: Explosions struck near pro-government rally in Tehran attended by Ali Larijani, President Pezeshkian, FM Araghchi. At least 1 killed.

title: IDF: 7,600 strikes in Iran, 1,100 in Lebanon
detail: Israel reports 7,600 strikes in Iran and 1,100 in Lebanon since Feb 28. Oil prices up 40% since war start.

title: Tehran police stations struck
detail: Combined force strikes Law Enforcement Command Station 108 (Navab) and Station 148 (Enghelab) in Tehran.

title: Sustained Gulf attacks continue
detail: Iran presses sustained missile and drone attacks across Gulf. Smoke rises from energy installations in Fujairah, UAE.

title: US KIA reaches 14
detail: US identifies 6 airmen killed in KC-135 crash. Total US military dead reaches 14, with ~200 wounded.

title: Hegseth: Iran defense industry nearly destroyed
detail: US Defense Secretary says Iran's defense industry is nearly destroyed. Pentagon vows to ramp up campaign.
